name: Tortilla Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the cream cheese and sour cream.
2. Add the taco seasoning mix to blend.
3. Add the black olives and green chiles. Mix well.
4. Spread the mixture on the flour tortillas.
5. Roll up each tortilla.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
7. Slice before serving.
